scripts.audit: pnpm run audit:prod && pnpm run audit:dev
scripts.build: echo "No packages have a build step."
scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run fmt:check && pnpm run lint:check && pnpm run test
scripts.check:strict: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run fmt:check && pnpm run lint:strict && pnpm run test:coverage && pnpm run audit
scripts.ci: pnpm run check:strict && pnpm run build
scripts.lint: pnpm run root:lint && pnpm --recursive run ws lint
scripts.lint:check: pnpm run root:lint:check && pnpm --recursive run ws lint:check
scripts.lint:strict: pnpm run root:lint:strict && pnpm --recursive run ws lint:strict
scripts.root:check: pnpm run root:typecheck && pnpm run fmt:check && pnpm run root:lint:check && pnpm run root:test
scripts.root:lint:strict: echo "Strict linting for the workspace root cannot be enabled until a pattern is accepted as an argument. Falling back to normal linting." && pnpm run root:lint:check
scripts.test: pnpm run root:test && pnpm --recursive run ws test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run root:test && pnpm --recursive run ws test:coverage
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:root && pnpm --recursive run ws typecheck
